# Beijing Ascend Artificial Intelligence Technology Co., Ltd.

**AI / Large Language Model Intern** | September 2025 - October 2025

**TL;DR:** Studied Transformer structures and RAG frameworks, developing a localized government service QA prototype by integrating distilled DeepSeek models using FastAPI and Spring Boot with FAISS vector stores.

## 🎯 Objectives
To master large language model architectures and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methodologies. Aimed to build an end-to-end question-answering prototype for government affairs, deploying localized distilled models with robust API endpoints.

## 💻 Tech Stack
DeepSeek, Qwen-1.5B (Distilled), RAG, Transformer, FAISS, Spring Boot, FastAPI, Python

## 🛠️ Core Contributions
* **RAG Workflow Engineering:** Investigated Transformer attention layers and model weight processing. Orchestrated the RAG pipeline by optimizing document chunking, prompt templates, and output context controls.
* **Vector Indexing & Retrieval:** Created highly responsive local vector indices using FAISS. Evaluated multiple semantic embedding models to optimize vector similarity query accuracy and suppress noise.
* **Model Deployment & API Services:** Deployed Qwen-1.5B distilled DeepSeek models locally. Programmed backend interfaces using FastAPI and Spring Boot to serve high-throughput API endpoints supporting SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming.
* **Full-Stack Prototyping:** Collaborated on API protocol designs between the Python inference engine and Java frontend layout, leading to a fully self-contained local application package.

## 🏆 Key Results & Quantified Impact
* Delivered a functional localized offline RAG client with first-token latency under 200ms.
* Structured and vector-indexed official policy documents, improving retrieval response accuracy by 40% over baseline keyword matching.
* Received highly positive evaluations from internship supervisors for rapid AI prototyping capabilities.
